rag_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting AGREE annex blocks only in valid component or implementation scopes
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations in implementation contracts
Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees in component type contracts only when concrete bounds or visible relations are available
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
generic_rules: Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic in AGREE contracts
Use AGREE logical operators such as and, or, not(...), and implication => in contracts
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use eq name : type = expression; for equations
Use const name : type = value; for constants
Use assign output = expression; for output assignments
Use assume "label": expression; and guarantee "label": expression; for assumptions and guarantees
anti_patterns: Do not encode AADL property associations as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Do not place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees in component type contracts without concrete bounds or visible relations
